title: desmodium adscendens
intro: Desmodium adscendens, also known as tick clover or climbing tick trefoil, is a perennial legume native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which help to alleviate various health issues. The plant has been found to have numerous health benefits, including reducing fever, treating digestive problems, and aiding in the management of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Desmodium adscendens include infusions, decoctions, and powders, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
